description: Before a newly installed water main can be put into service, it must be flushed and disinfected.

nodes.task_description: Generate a flushing plan to ensure all stagnant water is removed from the new pipe.

expected_outcome.value: System creates a sequence of hydrant operations to achieve the required flushing velocity.

nodes.task_description: After flushing, create a plan to inject a high concentration of chlorine into the main and let it sit for the required contact time.

expected_outcome.value: System calculates the required chlorine dosage and contact time.

nodes.task_description: After disinfection, schedule the collection of water samples to be tested for bacteria.

expected_outcome.value: System creates work orders for the sampling crew.
